title: Co-Heirs.
content:
We are co-heirs with Christ; nor shall His own
    Heirship be less by our adoption.
    The number here of heirs shall from the state
    Of His great birthright nothing derogate.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Co-Heirs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
